title: Enhanced Combat
body:
### REQUIRES ProtocolLib v5.4.0 | https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/
# Enhanced Combat
Complete classic PvP restored. Real timing, real skill, zero nonsense.

✨ Overview

Enhanced Combat is a premium-quality combat overhaul that fully restores classic, pre-1.9 PvP while keeping it smooth, stable, and highly configurable for modern servers.

No clunky cooldown circles. No spammy gimmicks. Just fast, responsive, skill-based combat where aim, timing, movement, and game sense decide the fight—exactly how competitive players expect.

![Enhanced Combat](https://i.ibb.co/zTYvQvxp/Chat-GPT-Image-Nov-11-2025-12-26-25-PM.png)

🛡 Key Highlights

True classic feel – Recreates the old-school PvP style with precise hit timing and consistent damage.

Skill-based gameplay – Rewards strafing, W-tapping, crits, and combos instead of attack-speed RNG.

Drop-in ready – Works out-of-the-box on modern Paper/Purpur with sensible defaults.

Highly configurable – Toggle or fine-tune mechanics per world, per gamemode, or per arena.

Network friendly – Designed to cooperate with anti-cheats, kits, duels, factions, and ranked ladders.

Use Enhanced Combat to give your players what they keep asking for: clean, competitive, classic PvP, delivered in a professional, production-ready plugin.
